---
title: "Model Inspection"
author: "JW"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
runtime: shiny
---

```{css, echo=FALSE}
.main-container {
  max-width: 100% !important;
  margin-left:  0 !important;
  margin-right: 0 !important;
  padding-left:  15px;
  padding-right: 15px;
}
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
output_dir <- here::here("output")
devtools::load_all(here::here("../packages/damageRF"))
```

## Modell - Auswahl

```{r selectors}
run_dirs <- list.dirs(output_dir, full.names = FALSE, recursive = FALSE) |>
  (\(x) x[startsWith(x, "run")])()

select_run = shiny::selectInput("run", "Run", choices = run_dirs)

select_bspid = shiny::renderUI({
  shiny::req(input$run)
  model_dirs <- list.dirs(
    file.path(output_dir, input$run),
    full.names = FALSE,
    recursive = FALSE
  )
  shiny::selectInput("model", "Modell", choices = model_dirs)
})

select_rds = shiny::renderUI({
  shiny::req(input$run, input$model)
  rds_files <- list.files(
    file.path(output_dir, input$run, input$model),
    pattern = "\\.rds$", ignore.case = TRUE
  )
  shiny::selectInput("rds_file", "RDS-Datei", choices = rds_files)
})

button_read = shiny::actionButton("load", "Einlesen", icon = shiny::icon("folder-open"))

shiny::fluidRow(
  shiny::column(3, select_run),
  shiny::column(3, select_bspid),
  shiny::column(3, select_rds),
  shiny::column(3, shiny::div(style = "margin-top: 25px;", button_read))
)
```

## Ergebnisse

```{r load_rds}
rds_data <- shiny::eventReactive(input$load, {
  shiny::req(input$run, input$model, input$rds_file)
  readRDS(file.path(output_dir, input$run, input$model, input$rds_file))
})
```

```{r dynamic_ui}
shiny::renderUI({
  shiny::req(rds_data())
  shiny::tagList(
    shiny::hr(),
    shiny::h4("Modellmetriken"),
    shiny::plotOutput("plot_plotter", height = "800px"),
    shiny::h4("Threshold Performance"),
    shiny::plotOutput("plot_thresh"),
    shiny::h4("Konfusionsmatrix OOFB (Threshold 0.5)"),
    shiny::verbatimTextOutput("cm_oofb_default"),
    shiny::h4(shiny::textOutput("best_thresh_label")),
    shiny::h4("Konfusionsmatrix OOFB (adjustiert)"),
    shiny::verbatimTextOutput("cm_oofb_adj"),
    shiny::h4("Konfusionsmatrix Holdout (Threshold 0.5)"),
    shiny::verbatimTextOutput("cm_holdout_default"),
    shiny::h4("Konfusionsmatrix Holdout (adjustiert)"),
    shiny::verbatimTextOutput("cm_holdout_adj"),
    shiny::h4("OOFB Predicted Probability Density"),
    shiny::plotOutput("plot_oofb"),
    shiny::h4("Holdout Predicted Probability Density"),
    shiny::plotOutput("plot_prob")
  )
})
```

```{r dynamic_renderers}
shiny::observe({
  data <- rds_data()
  shiny::req(data)
  m <- data@models[["binary_classification"]]

  shiny::withProgress(message = "Erstelle Plots", value = 0, {
    output[["plot_plotter"]] <- shiny::renderPlot({
      damageRF::plotter(data)
    })
    shiny::incProgress(amount = 1/4, detail = "Metriken")

    output[["plot_thresh"]] <- shiny::renderPlot({
      m@prediction$threshold_perf |>
        ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = .threshold, y = .estimate, color = .metric)) +
        ggplot2::geom_line(lwd = 1.2) +
        ggplot2::theme_minimal()
    })
    shiny::incProgress(amount = 1/4, detail = "Threshold")

    output[["cm_oofb_default"]] <- shiny::renderPrint({
      yardstick::conf_mat(
        m@prediction$OOFB,
        truth    = target,
        estimate = .pred_class
      )$table |> t()
    })

    output[["best_thresh_label"]] <- shiny::renderText({
      paste("Best Threshold:", round(m@prediction$best_threshold, 4))
    })

    output[["cm_oofb_adj"]] <- shiny::renderPrint({
      truth_counts <- table(m@prediction$OOFB$target)
      minority_cls <- names(which.min(truth_counts))
      majority_cls <- names(which.max(truth_counts))
      pred_col     <- paste0(".pred_", minority_cls)
      lvls         <- names(sort(truth_counts))
      m@prediction$OOFB |>
        dplyr::mutate(
          .pred_class_adj = factor(
            ifelse(.data[[pred_col]] >= m@prediction$best_threshold, minority_cls, majority_cls),
            levels = lvls
          ),
          target = factor(target, levels = lvls)
        ) |>
        yardstick::conf_mat(truth = target, estimate = .pred_class_adj) |>
        (\(x) t(x$table))()
    })

    output[["cm_holdout_default"]] <- shiny::renderPrint({
      truth_counts <- table(m@prediction$prob$truth)
      minority_cls <- names(which.min(truth_counts))
      majority_cls <- names(which.max(truth_counts))
      pred_col     <- paste0(".pred_", minority_cls)
      lvls         <- names(sort(truth_counts))
      m@prediction$prob |>
        dplyr::mutate(
          .pred_class_def = factor(
            ifelse(.data[[pred_col]] >= 0.5, minority_cls, majority_cls),
            levels = lvls
          ),
          truth = factor(truth, levels = lvls)
        ) |>
        yardstick::conf_mat(truth = truth, estimate = .pred_class_def) |>
        (\(x) t(x$table))()
    })

    output[["cm_holdout_adj"]] <- shiny::renderPrint({
      yardstick::conf_mat(
        m@prediction$pred,
        truth    = truth,
        estimate = .pred_class
      )$table |> t()
    })

    output[["plot_oofb"]] <- shiny::renderPlot({
      minority_cls <- names(which.min(table(m@prediction$OOFB$target)))
      pred_col     <- paste0(".pred_", minority_cls)
      ggplot2::ggplot(
        m@prediction$OOFB,
        ggplot2::aes(x = .data[[pred_col]], fill = target)
      ) +
        ggplot2::geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
        ggplot2::xlab(pred_col) +
        ggplot2::theme_minimal()
    })
    shiny::incProgress(amount = 1/4, detail = "OOFB")

    output[["plot_prob"]] <- shiny::renderPlot({
      minority_cls <- names(which.min(table(m@prediction$prob$truth)))
      pred_col     <- paste0(".pred_", minority_cls)
      ggplot2::ggplot(
        m@prediction$prob,
        ggplot2::aes(x = .data[[pred_col]], fill = truth)
      ) +
        ggplot2::geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
        ggplot2::xlab(pred_col) +
        ggplot2::theme_minimal()
    })
    shiny::incProgress(amount = 1/4, detail = "Prob")
  })
})
```
